name: Rabbit with Tomatoes and Herbs
recipeIngredient: 2 Rabbit Backs, each cut into 4 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix thyme with garlic. Salt and pepper the rabbit pieces and rub them with the thyme mixture. Place a small piece of bay leaf on each piece and wrap in 2 pieces of bacon, then tie with cooking string.
2. Brown the rabbit in olive oil until golden brown, then remove.
3. Sauté onions; add tomatoes and cook for about 8 minutes, seasoning with salt and pepper.
4. Put the rabbit pieces back on top and cover. Simmer for 20-25 minutes, adding water if necessary.
5. Take the rabbit out and place it on a platter. Let the sauce simmer for a few minutes longer before pouring over the meat and sprinkling basil all over.
